title: "Reading Too Much Into It...": At NDTV's Indo-Japan Summit, Piyush Goyal On US' Pacific Command Move
summary_full: Union Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal said the US dropping India from its Indo-Pacific Command name should not be overinterpreted.
summary_public: Union Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal said the US dropping India from its Indo-Pacific Command name should not be overinterpreted.
